title: API Documentation
body_text: Welcome to the Example API documentation. Use the sidebar to navigate between endpoints.
selected: The rate limiting system uses a sliding window algorithm with per-key granularity. Each API key is allocated a base quota of 1000 requests per minute. Burst capacity allows temporary overages up to 150% of the base quota for windows shorter than 10 seconds. When the quota is exceeded, the server returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header indicating the number of seconds until the window resets. Authenticated requests from verified partners receive a 5x multiplier on their base allocation.
